description: USDA ERS retail price estimates for 150+ commonly consumed fresh and  processed fruits and vegetables. Includes price per pound/pint and  normalized price per edible cup equivalent.

properties.name: AverageRetailPrice
properties.description: Average retail price per unit (pound or pint)

properties.name: Unit
properties.description: Unit of measure - PerPound (solids) or PerPint (juice)

properties.name: PreparationYieldFactor
properties.description: Fraction of product that is edible after preparation (0.0-1.0)

properties.name: CupEquivalentSize
properties.description: Size of one edible cup equivalent

properties.name: PricePerCupEquivalent
properties.description: Normalized price per edible cup equivalent (comparable across forms)
